---
title: 'Beginner: Fundermentals of R'
subtitle: '2.0 Data Structures Assignement'
author: "Prepared By Clinton Moshe Mwachia"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Vectors

```{r}

```

# Lists

```{r}

```

# Matrices

```{r}

```

# Data Frames
